Finished in Black Clearcoat with a black interior, this Wrangler is powered by a responsive 4-cylinder engine and equipped with legendary 4x4, making it perfect for Wisconsin winters, weekend adventures, and everyday driving.  This Sahara is loaded with premium features including the Sky One-Touch Power Top, Sahara Popular Equipment Group, dual-zone automatic climate control, ParkView backup camera, forward collision warning, and trailer sway control. Enjoy open-air freedom with removable windows, a full-size spare, skid plates, and rugged suspension built for both city streets and off-road trails. With four doors and a spacious interior, this Wrangler blends versatility with unmistakable Jeep attitude.  Conveniently located in Kenosha, we proudly serve drivers from Pleasant Prairie, Racine, Somers, Bristol, and nearby Illinois cities such as Waukegan, Gurnee, Antioch, Zion, and Lake Forest. This used Jeep Wrangler Sahara 4x4 is a great option for drivers looking for capability, style, and everyday usability.  Trade-ins are welcome, and financing is available to fit your budget. Visit Palmen Motors / Palmen Kia in Kenosha, WI today and see why this Jeep Wrangler Sahara stands out on Cars.com and CarGurus.  About Us: Howard Palmen's sons, Ron and Roger, took over the business in 1970, and acquired the Dodge franchise. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. description: Just arrived is this confident handling, FACTORY FRESH, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, NONSMOKER, ALL-WHEEL DRIVE 2024 Mazda CX-50 2.5 S with the Select Package! This compact crossover SUV is ''comfortable, spacious and well appointed, with an interior that looks and feels a cut above anything else in this class. It's quick and fun to drive, too,'' Edmunds writes. It ''sports gorgeous looks and a premium-feeling cabin, and it's backed by athletic performance and lots of standard equipment,'' U.S. News adds. The Insurance Institute for Highway Safety awarded the 2024 Mazda CX-50 a TOP SAFETY PICK+ designation, the organization's highest honor. The CX-50 earned the highest rating of Good in the four crash tests conducted. With its odometer now hovering around the 47,930 mark, it is STILL COVERED under the balance of the factory BUMPER-TO-BUMPER warranty until December 2026 or 36,000 miles (whichever occurs first)! Additionally, its engine, transmission and drive axles will be covered by the remainder of the POWERTRAIN warranty until 2028 or 60,000 miles! Standard advanced driver assist systems include: Forward collision warning with automatic braking (warns you of an impending collision and applies the brakes in certain scenarios) Blind-Spot warning with rear cross-traffic warning (alerts you if a vehicle is in your blind spot during a lane change or while in reverse) Lane departure mitigation (warns you of a lane departure when a turn signal isn't used and can automatically steer to maintain lane position) Adaptive cruise control (adjusts speed to maintain a constant distance between the vehicle and the car in front) For 2024, the Select trim/package is the new base version of the CX-50. It has: 17-inch black alloy wheels LED headlights Roof rails Remote keyless entry and keyless start Dual-zone automatic climate control Partial synthetic leather upholstery 60/40-split folding rear seats Partial digital instrument panel 10.25-inch infotainment display Apple CarPlay and Android Auto smartphone integration (both with wireless connectivity) Eight-speaker audio system As it's been said about Mazda: you won't pay luxury prices for a luxury experience. This electric luxury crossover pairs a roomy, tech-forward cabin with a smooth automatic powertrain and competitive electric range; recent market pricing updates make now a smart time to consider this LYRIQ before offers shift again.  Preferred Equipment Group 1SK adds a refined mix of comfort and convenience equipment to enhance daily driving and long-distance comfort without complicating your ownership experience.  Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto mirroring keeps your apps, navigation and music at your fingertips without cords, so your phone stays charged and your cabin stays tidy.  Hands-off steering assist with lane centering reduces highway fatigue by helping maintain speed, distance and lane positiongiving you a true co-pilot for long trips.  Active blind spot system increases confidence in lane changes by warning you to potential side hazards and intervening to help prevent unsafe maneuvers.  Forward collision mitigation constantly watches the road ahead and steps in when it detects an imminent impact, helping to lower the chance or severity of frontal crashes.  Front pedestrian impact prevention helps detect and react to pedestrians in your path, offering an added layer of protection in busy urban environments.  Automatic curve slowdown cruise control uses GPS and sensors to ease speed for bends and hills, smoothing out long drives and helping reduce driver strain.  Unresponsive driver assist monitors for prolonged inattention and can safely slow and stop the vehicle while alerting others, designed to protect you if something unexpected happens.  A built-in mobile hotspot lets passengers stay connected on the go so everyone can stream, work or browse without draining their phone data.  The rear camera with washer keeps the backup view clear in messy conditions, making parking and reversing more reliable and reducing stress in bad weather.  Lane departure prevention actively helps keep the vehicle centered in its lane, taking corrective action if you begin to drift unintentionally.  The 2024 Cadillac LYRIQ 4dr Sport w/1SK blends intuitive tech, advanced safety systems and electric refinement into a comfortable, confident package. Option Group 01      This Tucson has the following features: Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring     To be sure you don't miss out, give us a call at 407-645-1234 and schedule a test drive. OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back! description: This  2022 Acura TLX w/Tech, has a Majestic Black Pearl exterior and Ebony interior color with only 14,335 miles. New brake pads and rotors! Stock Number P13745. You can connect  with us by calling (518) 241-3901.       No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. description: Experience the commanding presence of the 2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited, a sophisticated SUV designed for those who demand style and performance. With only 21,103 miles on the clock, this used vehicle combines luxury and utility in its striking Diamond Black Crystal Pearlcoat exterior, complemented by a plush black interior with beige accents. Powered by a 3.6-liter V6 engine producing 293 horsepower and 260 lb-ft of torque, it offers a smooth 8-speed automatic transmission and full-time 4WD, making it an ideal choice for both city driving and off-road adventures. This well-equipped SUV boasts a range of modern features, including adaptive cruise control, Apple CarPlay, a backup camera, blind spot monitor, Bluetooth connectivity, collision warning, cross traffic alert, heated seats, keyless entry, lane keep assist, leather seats, memory seats, built-in navigation, push start, rear heated seats, satellite radio readiness, a tow package, and Wi-Fi hotspot, ensuring comfort, safety, and entertainment at every turn.Designed for safety and security, the 2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited offers advanced features like automatic emergency braking at the rear, rear parking sensors, dual front knee airbags, and ABS for confident stopping power. The vehicle also includes a rear seat reminder to ensure no passenger is left behind, auto-locking power door locks, brake drying technology, and an electronic parking brake with auto-off functionality. These systems work together to provide peace of mind on every journey, making this SUV a dependable companion for daily commutes and weekend getaways alike.2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Safety and Security FeaturesThis vehicle prioritizes safety with an array of advanced features. Automatic emergency braking at the rear helps prevent collisions, while rear parking sensors assist with parking precision. The inclusion of dual front knee airbags enhances occupant protection, complemented by rear parking sensors and ABS for secure braking. Emergency braking preparation ensures readiness in sudden stop scenarios, and auto-locking power door locks enhance security. Brake drying technology improves braking performance in wet conditions, while the electronic parking brake with auto-off feature adds convenience and safety during parking maneuvers.2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Entertainment and Technology FeaturesStay connected and entertained with cutting-edge technology in the Grand Cherokee Limited. SiriusXM Guardian compatibility allows for smart device app integration, providing remote vehicle management and security features. The 10.1-inch infotainment touchscreen offers a user-friendly interface for navigation and media control, including voice-operated hands-free phone calls and radio functions. HD radio and Pandora internet radio app ensure a rich audio experience, while real-time traffic data keeps you informed on the go. Electronic messaging assistance, both read and voice-operated, adds convenience for staying connected without distraction.2023 Jeep Grand Cherokee Performance FeaturesPerformance is at the heart of the Grand Cherokee Limited, featuring an auto start/stop system that enhances fuel efficiency and reduces emissions. Its full-time 4WD system ensures optimal traction and stability across diverse driving conditions, whether on pavement or rugged terrain. These features combine to deliver a balanced blend of power, efficiency, and confidence, making this SUV a versatile choice for drivers who value capability and refinement.New Price! description: Just arrived is this engaging & luxurious, FACTORY FRESH, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, NONSMOKER, ALL-WHEEL DRIVE 2025 Mazda CX-70 3.3 Turbo S Premium! ''The 2025 Mazda CX-70 is virtually identical to the CX-90, save for its two rows of seating compared to the CX-90's three rows. We like its powerful turbocharged engine, sporty handling and high-end interior materials quality,'' Edmunds writes. It's got quick acceleration and high fuel economy too! The critics are diggin' it! IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK+ Award - The 2025 Mazda CX-70 (including the CX-70 PHEV) earned the Insurance Institute for Highway Safety's (IIHS) highest safety award. To achieve this, the vehicle had to receive top ratings in front and side crash tests, pedestrian front crash prevention, and have standard acceptable- or good-rated headlights. Best 2-Row Midsize SUV for Families - U.S. News & World Report named the 2025 CX-70 the Best 2-Row Midsize SUV for Families, recognizing its blend of practicality and premium features for families. With its odometer now hovering around the 7,046 mark, it is STILL COVERED under the balance of the factory BUMPER-TO-BUMPER warranty until September 2027 or 36,000 miles (whichever occurs first)! Additionally, its engine, transmission and drive axles will be covered by the remainder of the POWERTRAIN warranty until 2029 or 60,000 miles! Standard driver-assistance features: Stop-and-go adaptive cruise control Blind-spot monitoring Driver-attention monitoring Evasive-steering assist (helps steer the vehicle to avoid collisions) Forward-attention warning (helps prevent you from being inattentive or distracted while driving) Forward automatic emergency braking Forward collision warning Lane-departure warning Lane-keep assist Pedestrian detection Rearview camera Rear cross-traffic alert Rear-seat alert (reminds you to check the back seats for kids or pets before you exit the vehicle) Vehicle exit warning (alerts exiting passengers of vehicles approaching from behind) Yes, the 2025 Mazda CX-70 3.3 Turbo S Premium is a mild hybrid vehicle. It features a 48-volt mild hybrid system (M-Boost) that works with the 3.3L inline 6 turbocharged engine, providing smooth power delivery and improved fuel efficiency by assisting with the auto stop-start function. The 2025 CX-70 gets very good gasoline mileage for the midsize SUV segment. Models with the more powerful inline-six get 23/28 mpg city/highway.. Further features: LED self-leveling headlights Roof rails Power liftgate Sunroof 21-inch wheels 5,000-pound tow capacity with a specific tow drive mode Hands-free power liftgate Keyless entry and ignition Three-zone automatic climate control Power-adjustable, heated front seats 60/40-split folding rear seats with slide and recline Second-row window sunshades 12.3-inch infotainment display/touchscreen Apple CarPlay and Android Auto smartphone integration (both with wireless connectivity) Wireless charging pad Amazon Alexa integration Twin USB ports for both front and rear seats Mazda Connect remote services Pandora streaming integration Digital instrument panel Navigation system Driver's seat memory functions 12-speaker Bose audio system Upgraded interior lighting Enhanced lane keeping assistance and collision avoidance The 3.3 Turbo S Premium versions have the above features plus: Adaptive headlights (swivel as you turn the steering wheel for better illumination in curves) Panoramic sunroof Heated steering wheel Premium leather upholstery Power-adjustable steering wheel Ventilated front seats Heated rear seats Surround-view camera system (gives you a top-down view of the vehicle and its surroundings for tight parking situations) Reverse automatic braking (applies the brakes automatically to avoid an imminent collision with an object behind the vehicle) ...and you can certainly bet there's a bunch more! description: The 2019 Honda Pilot Elite is what happens when a sensible family SUV secretly dreams of being a luxury spaceship. From the outside, it looks calm, composed, and responsible-like it pays its taxes early. But underneath that polite exterior is a vehicle that's ready to haul kids, dogs, groceries, sports gear, and possibly a small village without breaking a sweat. Its big enough to command respect in a parking lot, yet still polite enough to fit between the lines (most of the time).  Inside, the Pilot Elite feels like a VIP lounge for people whose lives are slightly chaotic. Leather seats everywhere? Yes. Enough cupholders to hydrate an entire soccer team? Absolutely. Heated and ventilated front seats make sure you're comfortable whether its a frozen winter morning or a summer day when the sun has a personal vendetta against you. The cabin is so quiet and smooth that you might forget you're driving until the kids start arguing in the third row, which the Pilot heroically attempts to ignore with its excellent sound system.  Performance-wise, the V6 engine delivers confident power without trying to show off. Its not here to race sports cars; its here to merge onto the highway like a professional. All-wheel drive helps it handle snow, rain, and the occasional oops, that road wasn't paved situation. The Pilot Elite drives with the calm assurance of someone who's already read the instruction manual twice.  In short, the 2019 Honda Pilot Elite is the ultimate overachiever. Its practical, comfortable, and loaded with features, yet still manages to feel a little fancy. It wont brag about it, but this SUV knows its doing an excellent job. If cars could smile smugly, the Pilot Elite definitely would right before reminding you that you left your coffee in one of its 15 cupholders.  Recent Arrival! 2019 Honda Pilot AWD. Call us today at 210-635-1000 to schedule a test drive, or just stop by. We look forward to seeing you! Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.• Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security• Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.• Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. What this vehicle includes:               Convenience Keyfob activated door locks (all doors) - all for one! With keyfob activated door locks on all doors, getting everyone in to get going has never been easier. Now, no one has to wait for you to get in to unlock their door. And once you've arrived, secure your vehicle as you walk away with a touch of a button. Keyfob activated door locks for all doors is a key part of convenience.In-car Entertainment External memory control - Digital access anywhere. Your media of choice doesn't have to stay behind just because you're going somewhere.  Now, music and media from your hard-drive, devices or memory stick are easy to access and control from your vehicle, thanks to the external memory control.Safety and Security Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. Hill hold control - Don't go back. You know the feeling - you're stopped on a hill and you're worried about your vehicle rolling backwards when you release the brakes. This is even more worrisome when you're towing. With hill hold control, the vehicle automatically applies brake force to prevent itself from rolling back. So whether you're towing a heavy load or simply stopped on a steep incline, hill hold control keeps you on the up and up. Hill hold control - Don't go back. description: Welcome to the all new Holler Ford! This Certified 2019 Toyota Tacoma SR5, has a Midnight Black Metallic exterior and an Cement Gray interior color. 36,200 miles.  Stock Number KM099781.      No Accidents!     Important Package and Feature Information    2 LCD Monitors In The Front, Cruise Control w/Steering Wheel Controls, Dynamic Radar Cruise Control (DRCC)  Convenience Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. description: Discover the thrill of open-air driving in the 2020 Mazda Miata RF Club. This captivating sports car combines sleek style, exceptional performance, and a host of premium features that elevate the driving experience.   Convertible Hardtop  Bose Audio System with AudioPilot  MAZDA CONNECT Infotainment System  Heated Front Bucket Seats  17" Metallic Black Aluminum Alloy Wheels  Rear Window Defroster  Power Convertible Roof  Steering Wheel-Mounted Audio Controls  Rear Parking Camera  Blind Spot Monitoring  Rear Cross-Traffic Alert  Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel  Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control  Keyless Entry and Push-Button Start  Powered by a responsive 2.0L 4-cylinder DOHC engine and paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, the Miata RF Club delivers an exhilarating driving experience. With a refined rear-wheel-drive platform and nimble handling, this sports car will captivate your senses and leave you craving the open road.  The Miata RF's retractable hardtop roof seamlessly integrates with the sleek, aerodynamic design, providing the best of both worlds  the thrill of a convertible and the security of a coupe. When the top is down, you'll revel in the wind in your hair and the sun on your face, while the robust structure ensures a quiet, comfortable ride when the top is up.  Inside, the Miata RF Club's cabin is crafted with premium materials and thoughtful details. The heated front bucket seats provide exceptional support and comfort, while the MAZDA CONNECT infotainment system puts advanced connectivity and entertainment at your fingertips. Enjoy the rich, immersive sound of the Bose audio system as you carve through the curves.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, and a Rear Parking Camera to help you navigate with confidence. The Miata RF Club's responsive handling and advanced safety technologies work together to provide a thrilling yet secure driving experience.  Whether you're seeking the ultimate weekend getaway car or a daily driver that injects excitement into your commute, the 2020 Mazda Miata RF Club is the perfect choice. Experience the joy of open-air driving and discover the true essence of the sports car lifestyle. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional vehicle can transform your driving experience.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Convertible HardTop,9 Speakers,AM/FM radio: SiriusXM,MAZDA CONNECT Infotainment System,Radio data system,Radio: Bose Audio System w/AudioPilot,Air Conditioning,Rear window defroster,Power steering,Power windows,Remote keyless entry,Steering wheel mounted audio controls,Four wheel independent suspension,Speed-sensing steering,Traction control,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,ABS brakes,Dual front impact airbags,Dual front side impact airbags,Emergency communication system: MAZDA CONNECT,Front anti-roll bar,Low tire pressure warning,Occupant sensing airbag,Rear anti-roll bar,Brake assist,Electronic Stability Control,Exterior Parking Camera Rear,Panic alarm,Speed control,Bumpers: body-color,Convertible roof wind blocker,Power door mirrors,Spoiler,AppLink/Apple CarPlay and Android Auto,Convertible roof lining,Driver vanity mirror,Illuminated entry,Leather Shift Knob,Outside temperature display,Passenger vanity mirror,Power convertible roof,Sport steering wheel,Tachometer,Telescoping steering wheel,Tilt steering wheel,Trip computer,Cloth Upholstery w/Light Gray Stitching,Front Bucket Seats,Front Center Armrest,Heated Front Bucket Seats,Heated Rear seats,Alloy wheels,Wheels: 17" Metallic Black Aluminum Alloy,Glass rear window,Variably intermittent wipers
